# Section 1328 Bankruptcy Discharge - Complete Guide [2026]
> Section 1328 governs Chapter 13 discharge. Learn eligibility, exceptions, hardship discharge, and the 1328(f) filing bar. 2026 guide.

## About
section1328.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Section 1328(b) Hardship Discharge - Requirements and Process: https://section1328.org/1328b-hardship.html
- Section 1328(f) Discharge Eligibility Calculator: https://section1328.org/1328f-calculator.html
- Section 1328(f) - Discharge Timing Bars: https://section1328.org/discharge-bars.html
- Domestic Support Obligations in Chapter 13 - Section 1328(a)(2): https://section1328.org/domestic-support.html
- Section 1328(a) - The Full Chapter 13 Discharge: https://section1328.org/full-discharge.html
- Section 1328(b) - Hardship Discharge: https://section1328.org/hardship-discharge.html
- Section 1328 Bankruptcy Discharge - Complete Guide: https://section1328.org/
- Modifying Your Chapter 13 Plan Before Discharge - Section 1329: https://section1328.org/modification-before-discharge.html
- The Chapter 13 Superdischarge - What Changed After BAPCPA: https://section1328.org/superdischarge.html
- Section 1328 vs Section 727 - Chapter 13 vs Chapter 7 Discharge: https://section1328.org/vs-chapter-7.html
- Privacy Policy: https://section1328.org/privacy.html

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
